rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Elec. Code §255.006, which governs misleading use of office title in political advertising. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: A person commits an offense if the person knowingly enters into a contract or other agreement to print, publish, or broadcast political advertising with the intent to represent to an ordinary and prudent person that a candidate holds a public office that the candidate does not hold at the time the agreement is made.
_note: Rule text concerns election advertising; proposed change concerns property tax exemptions. No conflict.
